subject: [PATCH 0/3] vmsplice: make vmsplice a trivial wrapper for preadv2/pwritev2

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Identified potential regressions due to the writable pipe + SPLICE_F_NONBLOCK combination, which is a valid vmsplice call today. Suggested considering this when making changes.

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Recalled that vmsplice was blocked in some container runtimes due to security concerns, and suggested considering this when making changes.

2026-06-16.patch_summary: The patch aims to make vmsplice a trivial wrapper for preadv2/pwritev2, but concerns have been raised about potential regressions and the availability of vmsplice in containerized environments.
